note: Schema for the unified 4-bloc proof package. This is the maximum-strength output of the framework.

bloc1_contractual.description: Contractual proof: manifest complete, final_status correct, schema valid, integrity tests pass

bloc2_discriminant.description: Discriminant proof: confusion matrix, sensitivity/specificity >= 0.80, Fisher p < 0.01, decidability metrics, placebo battery

bloc3_robustness.description: Robustness proof: window stability, subsample stability, no verdict flipping
bloc3_robustness.pass_rule: NOT verdict_flip_detected AND (window_stability OR subsample_stability present)

bloc4_external.description: External proof: independent replication with external dataset, frozen protocol, no retuning

overall_verdict_rule.STRONG: bloc1 AND bloc2 AND bloc3 AND bloc4
overall_verdict_rule.ACCEPT: bloc1 AND bloc2 AND bloc3 (bloc4 pending)
